requirement_topic.en: SIGET Grid Connection for BESS — 60 Hz System, Distributor Interconnection, and SIEPAC Regional Grid Context
requirement_topic.zh: SIGET BESS并网——60 Hz系统、配电商互联及SIEPAC区域电网背景
requirement_topic.zht: SIGET BESS併網——60 Hz系統、配電商互聯及SIEPAC區域電網背景

summary.en: SIGET (Superintendencia General de Electricidad y Telecomunicaciones) is El Salvador's energy and telecommunications regulator, responsible for electricity sector oversight including grid-connection authorisations for generation and storage assets. CNE (Consejo Nacional de Energía) sets national energy policy. All grid-connected BESS installations in El Salvador — including utility-scale, commercial and industrial (C&I), and behind-the-meter projects — require SIGET authorisation and must comply with technical requirements established in the Ley General de Electricidad and associated reglamentos. Grid-connection technical requirements for BESS must be agreed with the relevant distribution utility: principal distributors are CAESS (Compañía de Alumbrado Eléctrico de San Salvador), DELSUR (Distribuidora de Electricidad del Sur), EEO (Empresa Eléctrica de Oriente), CLESA, and AES El Salvador. El Salvador's grid operates at 60 Hz and nominal voltages of 120/240 V single-phase (residential) and 120/240 V or 277/480 V three-phase (commercial/industrial) — fundamentally different from China's 50 Hz / 220/380 V grid. BESS power conversion systems (PCS) must be designed, configured, and validated specifically for 60 Hz operation. El Salvador also participates in the SIEPAC (Sistema de Interconexión Eléctrica de los Países de América Central) regional interconnection — exporters of utility-scale BESS should verify whether SIEPAC regional grid-code obligations apply to their project.
summary.zh: SIGET（电力与电信总监管局）是萨尔瓦多的能源和电信监管机构，负责电力行业监管，包括发电和储能资产的并网授权。CNE（国家能源委员会）制定国家能源政策。萨尔瓦多所有并网BESS装置——包括公用事业规模、商业和工业（C&I）及表后项目——均须取得SIGET授权，并须符合《电力总法》及相关法规规定的技术要求。BESS并网技术要求须与相关配电企业协商确定：主要配电商包括CAESS（圣萨尔瓦多照明电力公司）、DELSUR（南部配电公司）、EEO（东部电力企业）、CLESA和AES萨尔瓦多。萨尔瓦多电网运行频率为60 Hz，标称电压为单相120/240 V（住宅）和三相120/240 V或277/480 V（商业/工业）——与中国50 Hz / 220/380 V电网存在根本性差异。BESS储能变流器（PCS）须专门针对60 Hz运行进行设计、配置和验证。萨尔瓦多还参与SIEPAC（中美洲国家电力互联系统）区域互联——公用事业规模BESS出口商应向SIGET核实是否适用SIEPAC区域电网规范义务。
summary.zht: SIGET（電力與電信總監管局）是薩爾瓦多的能源和電信監管機構，負責電力行業監管，包括發電和儲能資產的併網授權。CNE（國家能源委員會）制定國家能源政策。薩爾瓦多所有併網BESS裝置——包括公用事業規模、商業和工業（C&I）及表後項目——均須取得SIGET授權，並須符合《電力總法》及相關法規規定的技術要求。BESS併網技術要求須與相關配電企業協商確定：主要配電商包括CAESS（聖薩爾瓦多照明電力公司）、DELSUR（南部配電公司）、EEO（東部電力企業）、CLESA和AES薩爾瓦多。薩爾瓦多電網運行頻率為60 Hz，標稱電壓為單相120/240 V（住宅）和三相120/240 V或277/480 V（商業/工業）——與中國50 Hz / 220/380 V電網存在根本性差異。BESS儲能變流器（PCS）須專門針對60 Hz運行進行設計、配置和驗證。薩爾瓦多還參與SIEPAC（中美洲國家電力互聯系統）區域互聯——公用事業規模BESS出口商應向SIGET核實是否適用SIEPAC區域電網規範義務。

standards_or_laws: Ley General de Electricidad (El Salvador) — primary legal framework governing electricity sector, grid connection, and SIGET authorisation
SIGET — Superintendencia General de Electricidad y Telecomunicaciones (grid-connection authorisation authority for generation and storage assets)
CNE — Consejo Nacional de Energía (national energy policy framework)
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
SIEPAC — Sistema de Interconexión Eléctrica de los Países de América Central (regional grid interconnection; verify regional grid-code obligations with SIGET for utility-scale projects)

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (220 V single-phase, 380 V three-phase) — fundamentally different from El Salvador's 60 Hz, 120/240 V or 277/480 V grid. The frequency difference (50 Hz vs 60 Hz) is not a simple re-parameterisation: PCS firmware, protection relay settings, reactive-power control, anti-islanding functions, harmonic filter design, and transformer specifications must all be redesigned or revalidated for 60 Hz operation. Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not transfer to El Salvador's SIGET framework.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（单相220 V、三相380 V）——与萨尔瓦多60 Hz、120/240 V或277/480 V电网存在根本性差异。频率差异（50 Hz对比60 Hz）并非简单的重新参数配置：PCS固件、保护继电器设置、无功功率控制、反孤岛功能、谐波滤波器设计和变压器规格均须针对60 Hz运行重新设计或重新验证。中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不可转用于萨尔瓦多SIGET框架。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（單相220 V、三相380 V）——與薩爾瓦多60 Hz、120/240 V或277/480 V電網存在根本性差異。頻率差異（50 Hz對比60 Hz）並非簡單的重新參數配置：PCS韌體、保護繼電器設定、無功功率控制、反孤島功能、諧波濾波器設計和變壓器規格均須針對60 Hz運行重新設計或重新驗證。中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用於薩爾瓦多SIGET框架。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: The 50 Hz-to-60 Hz frequency difference is a fundamental hardware and firmware incompatibility, not a documentation gap. Chinese BESS PCS units rated and validated for 50 Hz must be specifically redesigned or revalidated for 60 Hz operation before supply to El Salvador — this includes: (a) PCS inverter firmware and DSP control parameters reconfigured for 60 Hz; (b) protection relay settings (over/under-frequency, over/under-voltage, anti-islanding) recalibrated to El Salvador grid tolerances; (c) passive filter components (inductors, capacitors) redesigned for 60 Hz if required; (d) transformer turns ratios adjusted for 120/240 V or 277/480 V service voltage; (e) reactive-power and harmonic performance verified at 60 Hz to comply with SIGET distributor interconnection technical requirements. Additionally: (f) engage SIGET and the relevant distribution utility (CAESS, DELSUR, EEO, CLESA, or AES El Salvador) at the earliest project stage to obtain technical interconnection requirements; (g) verify SIEPAC regional grid-code obligations for utility-scale projects; (h) Chinese GB/T standards-based grid-connection evidence is not accepted by SIGET or El Salvador distributors as a substitute for local technical compliance.
gap.zh: 关键差距：50 Hz至60 Hz的频率差异是根本性的硬件和固件不兼容问题，而非文件差距。针对50 Hz进行额定和验证的中国BESS储能变流器单元在供应萨尔瓦多前须专门针对60 Hz运行重新设计或重新验证——包括：（a）PCS逆变器固件和DSP控制参数针对60 Hz重新配置；（b）保护继电器设置（过/欠频、过/欠压、反孤岛）根据萨尔瓦多电网容差重新校准；（c）如需要，无源滤波器元件（电感、电容）针对60 Hz重新设计；（d）变压器匝数比调整以适应120/240 V或277/480 V服务电压；（e）无功功率和谐波性能在60 Hz下经验证，符合SIGET配电商互联技术要求。此外：（f）在项目最早阶段与SIGET及相关配电企业（CAESS、DELSUR、EEO、CLESA或AES萨尔瓦多）接触，获取技术互联要求；（g）核实公用事业规模项目的SIEPAC区域电网规范义务；（h）基于中国GB/T标准的并网合规证据不被SIGET或萨尔瓦多配电商接受为当地技术合规的替代依据。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：50 Hz至60 Hz的頻率差異是根本性的硬件和韌體不相容問題，而非文件差距。針對50 Hz進行額定和驗證的中國BESS儲能變流器單元在供應薩爾瓦多前須專門針對60 Hz運行重新設計或重新驗證——包括：（a）PCS逆變器韌體和DSP控制參數針對60 Hz重新配置；（b）保護繼電器設定（過/欠頻、過/欠壓、反孤島）根據薩爾瓦多電網容差重新校準；（c）如需要，無源濾波器元件（電感、電容）針對60 Hz重新設計；（d）變壓器匝數比調整以適應120/240 V或277/480 V服務電壓；（e）無功功率和諧波性能在60 Hz下經驗證，符合SIGET配電商互聯技術要求。此外：（f）在項目最早階段與SIGET及相關配電企業（CAESS、DELSUR、EEO、CLESA或AES薩爾瓦多）接觸，獲取技術互聯要求；（g）核實公用事業規模項目的SIEPAC區域電網規範義務；（h）基於中國GB/T標準的併網合規證據不被SIGET或薩爾瓦多配電商接受為當地技術合規的替代依據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SIGET authorisation and distributor interconnection agreement required for all grid-connected BESS in El Salvador; 60 Hz / 120–240 V or 277/480 V grid parameters are non-negotiable technical requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558-2023 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to El Salvador

source.publisher: SIGET — Superintendencia General de Electricidad y Telecomunicaciones (El Salvador)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy SIGET's El Salvador grid-connection requirements. The 50 Hz to 60 Hz frequency difference is a fundamental PCS hardware and firmware redesign requirement — not correctable by reconfiguration alone. BESS PCS must be specifically engineered for 60 Hz operation and validated at El Salvador service voltages (120/240 V or 277/480 V). Engage SIGET and the relevant distributor at the earliest project stage to determine interconnection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications. Verify SIEPAC regional grid-code obligations for utility-scale projects. No publicly confirmed SIGET technical specification specifically for BESS grid connection has been verified as of the dataset date — direct SIGET and distributor engagement is essential before equipment specification is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足SIGET萨尔瓦多并网要求。50 Hz至60 Hz的频率差异是PCS硬件和固件的根本性重新设计要求——不可仅通过重新配置解决。BESS储能变流器须专门针对60 Hz运行工程设计，并在萨尔瓦多服务电压（120/240 V或277/480 V）下完成验证。应在项目最早阶段与SIGET及相关配电商接触，确定互联协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。核实公用事业规模项目的SIEPAC区域电网规范义务。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认SIGET公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格——在设备规格最终确定前，直接与SIGET和配电商接触至关重要。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足SIGET薩爾瓦多併網要求。50 Hz至60 Hz的頻率差異是PCS硬件和韌體的根本性重新設計要求——不可僅通過重新配置解決。BESS儲能變流器須專門針對60 Hz運行工程設計，並在薩爾瓦多服務電壓（120/240 V或277/480 V）下完成驗證。應在項目最早階段與SIGET及相關配電商接觸，確定互聯協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。核實公用事業規模項目的SIEPAC區域電網規範義務。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認SIGET公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格——在設備規格最終確定前，直接與SIGET和配電商接觸至關重要。
